title: Senior React Developer
description: We are seeking a senior React Developer to build interactive, performant user interfaces for our enterprise SaaS clients. You will write clean, well-tested TypeScript code and establish best practices for UI development.
requirements: Extensive experience with modern React (hooks, context) and state management.
Expert knowledge of TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and tailwind CSS.
Familiarity with React Router v7, Next.js, and SSR implementations.
Solid understanding of frontend testing using Jest, React Testing Library, or Playwright.
Proven track record of optimizing web applications for performance and accessibility (WCAG AA).
Strong communication and collaborative skills in a fully remote team environment.
responsibilities: Develop reusable, high-fidelity UI components and integrate complex backend APIs.
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect code.
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior frontend engineers.
Identify and resolve application performance bottlenecks and memory leaks.
Contribute to internal design systems and documentation.
Participate in agile scrum planning, refinement, and retrospectives.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We are looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage and optimize our cloud infrastructure, automate deployment pipelines, and ensure high availability across multiple staging and production systems.
requirements: Deep understanding of AWS (EC2, ECS, RDS, S3, IAM) or Microsoft Azure.
Experience writing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform or CloudFormation.
Hands-on experience with Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration.
Strong proficiency with CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins).
Familiarity with scripting languages such as Bash, Python, or Go.
Experience configuring monitoring and alerting systems (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog).
responsibilities: Maintain, monitor, and scale cloud hosting infrastructures for high-traffic apps.
Build, test, and automate scalable deployment and release pipelines.
Collaborate with development teams to optimize application architectures for cost and speed.
Implement robust security configurations, firewalls, and credential rotations.
Configure automated data backups and disaster recovery protocols.
Provide support and troubleshooting for infrastructure issues in staging/production.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Join our creative team as a UI/UX Designer. You will design intuitive customer journeys, wireframes, and gorgeous user interfaces for our web, mobile, and SaaS platform projects.
requirements: Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centric design processes, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups.
Advanced proficiency in Figma, design systems, and vector editing tools.
Solid understanding of design principles: typography, grids, layout, color, and hierarchy.
Familiarity with responsive web design and mobile app guidelines (iOS Human Interface, Android Material).
Ability to conduct user research, audits, usability tests, and build user personas.
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS limits is highly appreciated.
responsibilities: Establish user journeys, user flows, and wireframes to visualize product designs.
Design polished, high-fidelity visual mockups and interactive prototypes.
Maintain, organize, and expand our shared Figma design library.
Collaborate with developers to ensure designs are accurately implemented.
Audit existing user interfaces and suggest incremental improvements.
Present design iterations to internal teams and clients for feedback.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: We are seeking a Technical Project Manager to coordinate sprints, manage client stakeholders, and ensure software deliverables are shipped on time, within budget, and to our quality standard.
requirements: Experience managing software projects in an agile, scrum, or Kanban setting.
Strong understanding of the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and modern web concepts.
Proficiency with project management tools like Jira, Confluence, Linear, or Trello.
Excellent client-facing written and verbal communication skills.
Ability to write detailed technical specifications, project scopes, and task breakdowns.
PMP, CSM, or equivalent project management certification is a plus.
responsibilities: Coordinate development team sprints, standups, retro meetings, and backlog grooming.
Define project timelines, milestones, deliverables, and resource requirements.
Interface directly with clients to report progress, manage expectations, and collect requirements.
Identify and mitigate project risks, bottlenecks, and scope creep.
Verify quality of deliverables before showing them to clients.
Maintain clear and up-to-date project documentation in Confluence/Jira.
